ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pages" (
  "page_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page */,
  "page_name" TEXT /* Name of the page */,
  "page_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the page */,
  "page_url" TEXT /* URL of the page */,
  "home_objects" TEXT /* Objects present on the Home Page */,
  "sl_login_objects" TEXT /* Objects present on the SL Login Page */,
  "login_objects" TEXT /* Objects present on the Login Page */,
  "borr_ssn_objects" TEXT /* Objects present on the Borrower SSN Page */,
  "bor_doc_list_objects" TEXT /* Objects present on the Borrower Document List Page */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the page was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the page was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page where the action occurred */,
  "action_keyword" TEXT /* Keyword representing the action performed by the user */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., click, navigation, input) */,
  "action_target" TEXT /* Target element of the action (e.g., button, text field) */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user session associated with this action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the action occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES user_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("page_id") REFERENCES pages ("page_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with this session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the session started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the session ended */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent information of the user's browser */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used by the user (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the organization (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
